name: What’s better, Synup or Uberall?
hero_main_title: Get more for what you pay: one-suite marketing for multi-location brands
hero_summary: Uberall might be built for large enterprise teams, but Synup is designed for agencies and multi-location brands that are ready to grow. With Synup, you get better visibility, full ownership of your listings, and local marketing tools that don’t eat into your margins or require a learning curve.
counter_text_1: say they effortlessly increased store visits
counter_text_2: of businesses increased their online conversions year-over-year
counter_text_3: businesses seamlessly listed across key online platforms
new_summary: Uberall might be built for large enterprise teams, but Synup is designed for agencies that are ready to grow. With Synup, you get complete ownership of your data, better visibility in search, and tools that let you scale revenue without driving up costs.
section_2_summary: Uberall sells a closed ecosystem. Synup offers tools that work with your business, not against it. Below is a breakdown of where Synup gives you the edge.
section_2_slider_1_summary: Synup OS is agency-centric, fully API-driven, and built to streamline delivery across multiple clients. You get full data ownership, automation where it matters, and flexible tools that grow with your business.
section_2_slider_2_summary: Unlike Uberall, Synup gives you full ownership of your listings, supports bulk Google verification, auto-rejects incorrect updates, expands reach through data aggregators, provides multi-location audit reports, and ensures your listings appear in actual search results, not just directories.
section_2_step_3_summary: Synup gives you smarter, AI-powered review management with customizable response templates, an intuitive unified inbox, and fair pricing built for agencies and growing brands, while Uberall often feels clunky, overpriced, and limited to specific industries.
section_2_slider_4_summary: Synup goes beyond the basics with keyword and grid rank tracking, voice search optimization, and hyper-local campaigns that trigger based on time, weather, or events, while Uberall limits you to standard local pages and store locators with fewer targeting options and less flexibility
section_3_heading: Why Agencies Choose Synup Over Uberall
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Synup vs Uberall for Agency Success
why_choose_tab_desc_1: Manage every client and location from a single dashboard with filters by rep, vertical, or region. Instead of jumping between accounts, you get complete visibility and control in one place.
why_choose_tab_desc_2: Add, update, or deactivate client and location data at scale. Bulk Google verifications, data syncs, and updates across multiple clients keep your workflows efficient and error-free.
why_choose_tab_desc_3: Turn specific modules on or off for each client based on their needs. Whether it’s listings, reviews, SEO, or social, you choose what’s active without locking yourself into rigid bundles.
why_choose_content_title: Synup: The Ultimate Choice for Digital Mastery
why_choose_content_summary: Step Up to Synup – Your Path to Digital Dominance.
testimonial_summary: Boost your online presence effortlessly with Synup's Local Listings Management. List, optimize, and monitor profiles on Google, Facebook, Yelp, and premium partner sites. Ensure consistency across search, local, voice, and social platforms. Access detailed analytics for informed decision-making. Take charge of your brand image by controlling displayed information. Synup: Where online success begins with seamless listing management.
customer_review_1_summary: Synup empowered us to drive 20% more revenue through profile personalization - the numbers speak for themselves!
customer_review_2_name: Adrian Boysell CEO of Adrian Graphics & Marketing
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is a game-changer. Every multi-location business needs to use this service.
